module.name: no-magic-numbers
module.description: Disallow magic numbers; use named constants instead of raw numeric literals.

scenarios.name: should allow the numeric literal 0 as a common base case
should allow -1 as the sentinel not-found value
should allow numeric literals used as enum initializers
scenarios.given: an enum member declared as Foo = 42

scenarios.name: should report an unexplained numeric literal in an expression
scenarios.given: a binary expression using the literal 86400

scenarios.name: should report a magic number used as a function argument
